channel.title: Papers on Yuan Meng
channel.description: Recent content in Papers on Yuan Meng

item.title: Irreversibility of Life
item.author: mycaptainmy@gmail.com (Yuan Meng)
item.description: The summer of 2016 when Stranger Things Season 1 came out, I was a month away from leaving home to start my PhD in the States. I had just parted from my college classmates and professors, some of whom I really liked, and returned to my childhood home that felt so lonely and empty. Yet I was hopeful about what the future might hold, about the possibility of being accepted for who I am in a faraway land.
